description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a prominent black discharge horn attached to a metallic valve assembly at the top. The extinguisher features a red lever handle and a visible safety pin near the valve, with a metallic tube connecting the handle to the horn. Instructional and safety labels are affixed to the front and back of the cylinder, displaying text and pictograms in white, green, and red. The body is made of smooth, glossy metal, while the discharge horn is matte black and conical. The overall design is typical of a CO2 fire extinguisher, commonly found in urban environments such as garages, offices, and public buildings.
description: A red metal fire extinguisher with a black conical discharge horn, red lever handle, and visible safety labels on the cylinder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black discharge horn facing forward, partially obscuring the cylinder.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red lever handle, metallic valve, and the full length of the black discharge horn; safety label is visible on the cylinder.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the red cylinder and the attachment point of the discharge horn; label is partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the red lever handle, metallic valve, and the black discharge horn; a large instruction label is visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple rectangular labels with text and pictograms in white, green, and red are present on the front and back of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A large black conical discharge horn is attached to the valve assembly, extending outward and secured by a metallic tube.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible near the top of the valve assembly, secured with a small red tag or seal.
